description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large rectangular windows and a combination of white and dark gray exterior finishes. The structure includes a prominent front porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, and a carport integrated into the ground level. The property is enclosed by a sleek, dark fence and is accented by landscaped greenery, including a cluster of bushes and a tree on one side. The upper floor has multiple balconies and terraces with glass railings, providing outdoor living spaces. The overall layout is asymmetrical, with various overhangs and canopies adding depth to the facade. The building's clean lines and open spaces reflect a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white and dark gray finishes, featuring balconies, a front porch, and a carport within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, carport, and steps leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of windows, the carport, and the landscaped greenery along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balconies, glass railings, and a cluster of bushes adjacent to the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the upper terraces, side entrance, and a large tree near the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass balcony doors
